reviewContext.scope: Sprint 1 implementation review against behavioral-spec.md + verification-architecture.md + contracts/sprint-1.md

evidence.description: DeleteCancelled now emits [cancel-note-deletion, close-delete-modal] — FIND-I2-001 resolved. All 18 REQ-FEED covered.
Production FeedList cancel-wiring integration test: adapter.dispatchCancelNoteDeletion called exactly 1x through command bus.
5 pure-unit tests covering DeleteCancelled both-commands, order, noteId payload, null fallback, and state mutation.
'後で復元できます' modal wording, '削除（OS ゴミ箱に送る）' confirm label — REQ-FEED-012 satisfied.
Real body/createdAt/updatedAt/tags metadata passed to FeedRow from noteMetadata — REQ-FEED-001/002/003 satisfied.
EC-FEED-002/004/005/006/013 covered: 1-note feed, saving/switching block, editing-note delete disabled, pending-switch guard.
EC-FEED-001/003/014/015 covered: empty state, filtered empty, deleted row disappears, loading skeleton.
EC-FEED-011 (Esc key cancel) and EC-FEED-012 (backdrop cancel) both verified with adapter call assertions.
EC-FEED-007/008/009 covered: deletionErrorMessage for all 3 failure reasons including detail propagation.

FIND-I2-001 resolved: DeleteCancelled emits [cancel-note-deletion payload={noteId:state.activeDeleteModalNoteId??''}, close-delete-modal]. Exhaustive switch with never branch at lines 131-135. PROP-FEED-035 biconditional satisfied for all action kinds.
timestampLabel uses Intl.DateTimeFormat without new Date(); bodyPreviewLines total over all string inputs; isDeleteButtonDisabled null-safe.
deletionErrorMessage: exhaustive 3-variant switch, never throws, detail appended for 'unknown'.
dispatchCommand switch handles all 7 FeedCommand variants with never branch — Tier 0 exhaustive obligation met.
PROP-FEED-031: purity-audit grep zero hits on Date.now, new Date, @tauri-apps/api, window., document., setTimeout, setInterval, $state, $effect, $derived, invoke(.
PROP-FEED-032: tauriFeedAdapter.ts no listen; feedStateChannel.ts no invoke — IPC boundary intact.
DESIGN.md tokens: rgba(0,0,0,0.1) whisper border, border-radius:12px, 4-layer shadow, #f2f9ff tag background, max-width:160px, outline:2px solid #097fe8 focus ring.
DESIGN.md tokens: rgba(0,0,0,0.5) scrim, border-radius:16px, 5-layer Deep Shadow, #dd5b00 confirm button.
DESIGN.md tokens: border-left:4px solid #dd5b00 left-accent, 5-layer Deep Shadow, #0075de retry button.
PROP-FEED-005 totality 300 runs, PROP-FEED-006 purity 200 runs, PROP-FEED-007a/b/c/d mirroring 200 runs each, PROP-FEED-035 biconditional 300 runs — all structurally sound.
PROP-FEED-035 full biconditional at 500 runs over all arbFeedAction variants — correctly distinguishes trigger vs non-trigger causes.

FIND-I2-001 integration test proves production cancel wiring end-to-end: FeedList.svelte onClose → feedReducer(DeleteCancelled) → cancel-note-deletion command → dispatchCommand → adapter.dispatchCancelNoteDeletion.
